rules.description: External modules must use approved dental barrel exports instead of importing dental internals directly.
Dental bounded context must not import core or longevity bounded contexts.
Core and longevity bounded contexts must not import dental internals.

findings.message: External module imports dental internals directly; use the approved dental barrel export.
